name: bear
description: Use Bear notes through Bear's first-party BearCLI MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Read and write Bear notes through BearCLI.
interface.longDescription: Connects Codex to Bear using Bear's official BearCLI MCP server, with local guidance for safe search, reading, note creation, and edits.
defaultPrompt: Find my Bear notes about this topic.
Create a concise Bear note from this.
Append this update to an existing Bear note.
